features.name: WUCE Multi-Tenancy — Authorization Guard and Tenant Isolation

metrics.name: Authorization coverage rate
metrics.target: 100% (11/11 handlers)
metrics.evidence: 11/11 handlers now call requireJourneyAccess(). Verified by test suite on merged commit 1b1d068.

metrics.name: Cross-tenant journey data leakage prevention
metrics.baseline: Not established — no multi-tenant deployment exists yet
metrics.target: Zero cross-tenant API responses return journey data for caller from different tenant
metrics.minimumSignal: Phase 0 complete — 404 on all 9 KNOWN BUG routes for unauthorized callers
metrics.evidence: p2.1 establishes filesystem isolation boundary; p2.2 adds HTTP-layer cross-tenant guard (27/27 tests); p4.1 closes inference-layer gap (tenant-scoped prompt-cache keys + per-tenant rate-limit counters). Full measurement requires live multi-tenant deployment.

metrics.name: KNOWN BUG closure — unguarded journey route handlers
metrics.target: 0 unguarded handlers
metrics.evidence: 9 previously unguarded handlers now guarded — 0 remaining. KNOWN BUG closed. Verified by 13-test integration suite on merged commit 1b1d068.

metrics.name: Path-traversal guard validity under variable tenantId-derived repoRoot
metrics.baseline: Not established — repoRoot currently static; variable-root threat model not yet exercised
metrics.target: 0 guard failures against adversarial tenantId injection test suite

guardrails.label: accessToken never written to disk - strip-before-write invariant preserved
Zero-match OAuth rejection message does not expose TENANT_ORG_ALLOWLIST contents
req.session.accessToken is the canonical field name - no aliases
Org pagination fetch async/await - does not block event loop
Total org fetch completes within 5s; warning logged above 3s
Path-traversal guard on all tenant-derived disk write paths - HTTP 400, no raw path logged
guardrails.evidence: AC3 + NFR log-spy tests both pass in tests/check-p2.1-tenant-storage.js on merged PR#394

guardrails.label: getRepoRoot is synchronous and completes in under 1ms per call
guardrails.evidence: NFR test: 1000 calls complete in <1000ms. No await/fs calls in repo-root.js.

guardrails.label: p2.2 test suite completes in under 10 seconds
guardrails.evidence: NFR declared in story; timing assertion in test. Verified at /definition-of-done after merge.

guardrails.label: p2.2 test suite cleans up all temporary directories (try/finally)
guardrails.evidence: NFR declared in story; cleanup assertion in test. Verified at /definition-of-done after merge.

epics.name: Windows CI Parity and Pipeline Evolution

guardrails.label: No user-supplied content in innerHTML without sanitisation
guardrails.evidence: No viz/DOM changes in any E1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: No credentials, tokens, or personal data in committed files
guardrails.evidence: All E1 stories specify read-only operations. p3.1a, p3.1b, p3.1c, p3.1d: read-only filesystem access only, no network calls. p3.1e: documentation only. No credentials or PII in any deliverable.

guardrails.label: Viz reads local JSON only ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â no external fetch calls
guardrails.evidence: No viz changes in any E1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: Gate logic reads evidence fields from pipeline-state.json (not stage alone)
guardrails.evidence: p3.1b Architecture Constraints cite ADR-002 ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â new gate checks must evaluate at least one evidence field per file, not merely assert file existence.

guardrails.label: Fields written to pipeline-state.json must exist in schema
guardrails.evidence: p3.1b Architecture Constraints cite ADR-003 ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â any new gate output fields (e.g. checksRun, failedChecks) must be added to pipeline-state.schema.json in the same commit.

guardrails.label: Fields read by viz from pipeline-state.json must exist in schema
guardrails.evidence: No new pipeline-state.json fields read by viz introduced in E1 stories reviewed

guardrails.label: pipeline-viz.html renders without build step, server, or network
guardrails.evidence: No viz changes in any E1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: No npm devDependencies in pipeline-viz.html runtime
guardrails.evidence: No viz changes in any E1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: Stage enum in schema updated when skill adds/removes stage
guardrails.evidence: No new pipeline stages added or removed in E1 stories reviewed

guardrails.label: Gate add/remove synced with SKILL.md criteria
guardrails.evidence: No new governance gates added or removed in E1 stories reviewed (p3.1b extends an existing gate, not a new gate)

guardrails.label: Interactive elements keyboard-accessible
guardrails.evidence: No viz/UI changes in any E1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: Colour not sole indicator of gate status (icons/labels present)
guardrails.evidence: No viz/UI changes in any E1 story deliverables reviewed

guardrails.label: Gates must use evidence fields, not stage-proxy
guardrails.evidence: p3.1b Architecture Constraints cite ADR-002 ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â assurance gate extension must evaluate at least one evidence field per file. Assessed in p3.1b-assurance-gate-substantive-checks-review-1.

guardrails.label: Schema-first: fields defined before use
guardrails.evidence: p3.1b Architecture Constraints cite ADR-003 ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â new gate output fields added to pipeline-state.schema.json in same commit. Assessed in p3.1b-assurance-gate-substantive-checks-review-1.

guardrails.label: DoR touch-point contract binding at pre-merge ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â no silent scope bundling
guardrails.evidence: p3.1c Architecture Constraints cite ADR-008 ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â‚¬Â anti-overfitting gate change applies only to proposals evaluated after merge; retroactive re-evaluation explicitly excluded. Assessed in p3.1c-test-suite-integrity-review-1.

guardrails.label: Evaluation and write-back workflows must be separate triggers with separate permission scopes
guardrails.evidence: p3.1a and p3.1d Architecture Constraints both cite ADR-009. p3.1a: check-trace-commit.js reads origin/traces (not local). p3.1d Option A: scheduled workflow must follow two-workflow CI audit pattern. Assessed in p3.1a-review-1 and p3.1d-review-1.

guardrails.label: CI audit records must be persisted to main post-merge, not to feature branches
guardrails.evidence: p3.1a and p3.1d Architecture Constraints both cite ADR-010. p3.1a reads from origin/traces (post-merge main). p3.1d Option A: scheduled workflow persists audit records to main post-merge. Assessed in p3.1a-review-1 and p3.1d-review-1.
